rationale: Gov't Code §2001.224 governs Texas Employment Commission unemployment compensation hearings and is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: Section 2001.038 and Subchapters C through H do not apply to a hearing by the Texas Employment Commission to determine whether or not a claimant is entitled to unemployment compensation
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns unemployment compensation administrative hearings, not property tax homestead exemptions.
